name: PROVIDER_FAILOVER_POLICY
purpose: Select a healthy provider for each role using deterministic fallback chains and recovery probes.
rules: Prefer role primary provider when healthy.
If every provider is unhealthy, return BLOCKED with reason no_healthy_provider — never silent fail.
Analyst primary is GPT but may fall back to Claude.
Auditor and executor primary is Claude but may fall back to GPT.
gpt_codex is disabled_until_runner_ready — never select it while in this status.
Log inspected providers and fallback_used=true/false in event log.
Run provider_probe.py before selection when probe_before_dispatch=true.
provider_limit and api_error trigger switch; max_turns and config_error do not.
